RemediationStrings.Title: NoNameReleaseOnDemand (Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy))
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netbt\Parameters\NoNameReleaseOnDemand must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy).

RemediationStrings.Title: NodeType (Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy))
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Netbt\Parameters\NodeType must be 2. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy).

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableICMPRedirect (Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy))
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\EnableICMPRedirect must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy).

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableIPSourceRouting (Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy))
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\DisableIPSourceRouting must be 2. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy).

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableIPSourceRouting (Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy))
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip6\Parameters\DisableIPSourceRouting must be 2. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - MSS (Legacy).
